creator: marcus@miami.edu
text:
Gone is a terminal locking program for UNIX with many
	improvements over lock(1).  This new version gives the option of
	uisng the system password as the gone key, as well a uses GNU
	autoconf to build.

	The gone port tarball is at
	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/gone-98041901.tar.gz.
